overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game showing a character in Victorian attire holding a torch, walking through an ornate stone corridor and emerging onto a wooden waterfront dock at night. The environment features detailed gothic architecture with carved stone pillars, atmospheric stormy skies, and a large body of water.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone corridor with carved pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit stone corridor holding a torch aloft

entered.detail: tall stone pillar with intricate Celtic knot carvings and weathered texture
wooden wall panels with decorative lattice patterns and metal studs
large rectangular stone slabs forming the corridor floor
high vaulted stone ceiling with wooden beam supports

segments.scene_description: The character explores a narrow, enclosed gothic corridor with ornate stone pillars and carved wooden walls. The torch provides the primary light source in this indoor stone environment with no sky visible.

events.description: approaching the end of the corridor where the stone archway opens to the outside
ambient light from the stormy night sky becomes visible ahead, mixing with torchlight

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit archway with the torch held high, approaching the open sky

entered.detail: massive stone archway with intricate carvings marking the exit to the exterior
dark turbulent clouds visible through the archway opening
calm dark water visible beyond the archway exit
lit torches mounted on the corridor walls providing warm orange light
wooden platforms and beams attached to the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the corridor through a grand stone archway. The stormy night sky and water become visible ahead while wall sconces provide additional lighting. The space transitions from fully enclosed to semi-covered.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront dock extending over water

events.description: stepping from stone interior onto wooden dock planks at the water's edge
character turns right to follow the wooden dock along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock toward a stone brazier, with open water to the left and mountains in the distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with visible gaps
dark calm water reflecting the night sky alongside the dock
large stone fire pit with flames burning atop a pedestal at the dock's end
dark mountain range visible across the water under the stormy sky
exterior stone wall of the building with scaffolding and wooden platforms

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open wooden dock extending over dark water, with a stone brazier burning ahead. The environment is fully exposed to the stormy night sky, with mountains visible across the water and the building's exterior wall to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a gothic interior toward the expansive openness of a stormy waterfront. It begins within a narrow, enclosed corridor where the flickering light of a torch illuminates ornate stone pillars and carved wooden walls. As the character advances, the space transitions from fully enclosed to semi-covered, passing through a grand stone archway where wall sconces supplement the light and the dark night sky first becomes visible. The scene then opens completely as the camera emerges onto a wooden dock extending over dark water, shifting the perspective from the interior stone walls to a wide vista of distant mountains under a stormy sky. Finally, the movement settles in the open air, passing a burning stone brazier with the building's exterior wall receding to the right.
